name: SD Card
description: You’ve located the MicroSD Card, the most misplaced object in any FRC lab. It’s about the size of a fingernail but currently holds the entire soul of your robot’s vision system or a custom Linux distro that took the programming team three days to compile. Finding it in a dark desk drawer is an Hard feat of observation; usually, these only turn up when they get stuck in the tread of your sneakers or vanish into the 'black hole' of the carpet during a frantic pit repair.
